candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant, and equipment and amortization of intangible assets
candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A line, but there is no selected COGS reference bucket to attach it to because COGS final_choice is empty and the statement is presented by nature rather than by function.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant, and equipment
candidates.why: A component of total operating D&A, but not specifically identified as COGS-related and no COGS parent row was selected.
A component of total operating D&A, but not specifically identified as COGS-related and no COGS parent row was selected.

variables.notes: No clear COGS/cost of sales bucket was selected earlier. The income statement is presented by nature, and the visible D&A rows are not labeled as cost-of-sales/COGS depreciation or amortization. To avoid misclassification and double counting, do not add any row to COGS_DA.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant, and equipment and amortization of intangible assets
candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A line presented alongside Other external expenses and Employee benefit expenses, not as an apparent sub-component of those selected XSGA rows. It therefore appears to sit outside the selected XSGA bucket and should be added separately. It is also the summary row, preferred over component rows to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant, and equipment
candidates.why: This appears to be a component of the total D&A disclosure. Since a summary D&A row exists, this component should not be selected separately.
This appears to be a component of the total D&A disclosure. Since a summary D&A row exists, this component should not be selected separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Operating depreciation detail beneath the broader D&A disclosure, but not preferred because a summary D&A row exists.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant, and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Appears to be a balancing/detail line rather than the preferred summary D&A row.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant, and equipment and amortization of intangible assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists only of Other external expenses and Employee benefit expenses. The D&A line is disclosed separately at the same operating level before Total operating expenses, so it appears not to be embedded in those selected rows. Use the summary D&A row only, not its components.
